Inpraise Systems | Revolutionizing High-Speed Solutions

About us
Designing smart turbomachinery
Our practice taught us that inherent qualities such as safety, robustness, sustainability, notably in the case of complex machines, cannot be reduced to a specific function or small group of functions expressed as inputs and outputs in the functional hierarchy of a machine system.
We always address the challenges we are facing from an “outside the box” perspective. Our insight has led us to collectively embrace a careful stance, yet which is fundamentally flexible at its core.
We are passionate about projects representing a seemingly inevitable discrepancy between required parameters, as they allow us to achieve exceptional results.
Are off-the-shelf solutions falling short?
Are you searching for tailored rotating machines that align precisely with your unique specifications? At Inpraise systems, we specialize in creating customized solutions that meet your exact needs.
Navigating performance challenges?
Concerned about achieving optimal performance? Our expertise ensures your rotating machines not only meet but exceed performance expectations, providing unparalleled efficiency and reliability.
Ensuring uncompromised quality?
Are you in pursuit of pioneering solutions without compromising on quality? We prioritize excellence in every aspect, delivering high-quality rotating machines that set industry standards without sacrificing performance or reliability.
Seeking long-term support?
Benefit from strategic collaboration at each stage of your Technology Readiness Level. Partner with us for practical innovation turning your ideas into successful outcomes.
Specialized engineering consultation needed?
Elevate your projects with our tailored engineering services. From failure prediction to systems engineering, we offer expertise that goes beyond expectations.
Who we are
REVOLVING AROUND EFFICIENCY AND RELIABILITY
Inpraise Systems specializes in high-speed rotating machines integrated with power and control electronics for critical applications in space, power, chemical, and transportation industries.
The product range includes pumps, compressors, turbines, motors, generators, and inverters.
Our technological approach prioritizes high reliability, lifetime, and performance, reflected in our dedication to small-series production.
In addition to integrated solutions, we offer customized high-speed drives, control electronics, high-frequency stators, low-viscosity hydrodynamic bearings, gas bearing technology, and dynamic and static rotational sealings.
With a heritage dating back to 1976, Inpraise Systems possesses extensive expertise in bearing technology. We leverage this knowledge in product development and engineering services across multiple industries taking advantage of high-reliability turbomachines.
Engineering competencies
CAD modeling
Mechanical engineering (rotordynamics, bearing design, concept design, hydraulic design)
Electric motor design
Electrical engineering (power electronics, control electronics, FPGA design, prototyping, production)
Numerical analysis (CFD analysis, FEM static and dynamic analyses)
Test engineering (machine vibration analysis, tribological analysis, finite element analysis, optical structural analysis)
Systems engineering
Project management & product assurance
Dive into our universe
W
